channel.title: Self-monitoring on Nils Myszkowski, PhD
channel.description: Recent content in Self-monitoring on Nils Myszkowski, PhD

item.title: Appraising the Duality of Self-Monitoring: Psychometric Qualities of the Revised Self-Monitoring Scale and the Concern for Appropriateness Scale in French
item.description: What it’s about In this paper, we examine appraising the duality of self-monitoring. Abstract This paper examines the focal construct and reports empirical and/or psychometric evidence relevant to its interpretation. The findings contribute to the literature by clarifying measurement, theoretical implications, and practical applications in context. How to access the paper Go to the journal page for this article here. Download the PDF here.
